User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user info, reputation scores, and skill points

reputation.description: Reputation points for different skills (Technical, Business, Creative, Leadership, Communication)

ScheduleCourse.title: Schedule Course
ScheduleCourse.description: A single course schedule item with attendance tracking

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: An assignment item with daily milestone checklist

steps.description: Step-by-step daily milestones parsed by Gemini

ResumeReview.title: Resume Review
ResumeReview.description: Stores details of parsed resumes and matched internships

CertificateSubmission.title: Certificate Submission
CertificateSubmission.description: Stores details of submitted certificates and skill point updates

/users/{userId}.description: Main user documents containing reputation and stats

/users/{userId}/schedule/{courseId}.description: User's individual parsed timetable courses and attendance stats

/users/{userId}/assignments/{assignmentI.description: User's parsed assignments with milestone action plans

/users/{userId}/resume_reviews/{reviewId.description: User's uploaded resumes and Gemini feedback histories

/users/{userId}/certificates/{certId}.description: Awarded certificates and associated skill points
